notes_report.below_text:
(i)Term Loan is from City Union Bank, Tiruppur with an aggregate sanctioned limit of Rs. 100 Lakhs at an interest rate of 9.5% p.a. 

(ii) Term Loans are secured by way of First Charge on the Gross Block of Fixed Assets of the Company and Collaterally secured by the Fixed Assets belonging to Directors and their related concerns.

(iii) Besides, Directors have extended Personal guarantees in respect of these loans.

children.account: Current Maturities of Long Term Debts
children.account_name: current maturities of long term debts_rs iii

notes_report.below_text:
(i)Short Term Borrowings represent Export Packing Credit Facility of Rs. 1000 Lakhs and Foreign Bill Discounting Facility of Rs. 500 Lakhs from City Union Bank, Tiruppur at an interest rate of 9.5% p.a. 

(ii) Short Term Borrowings also include Export Packing Credit Facility of Rs. 700 Lakhs and Foreign Bill Discounting Facility of Rs. 300 Lakhs from State Bank of India, Tiruppur at an interest rate of 8.07 % after factoring the interest subsidy extended by Central Government. This facility is also interchangeably used in Foreign Currency at an interest rate of EURIBOR + 2%.  

(iii) Short Term Borrowings are primarily secured by way of hypothecation of present and future inventory and book debts of the Company. and collaterally secured by fixed assets belonging to Directors and related concerns.

(iv) Besides, Directors have given their personal guarantees in respect of these loans.

equity_share.comment:
The Company was incorporated on 11/01/2022 and since then, the Company :
    (i) has not allotted shares of any class for contracts without payment being received in cash.
    (ii) has not issued any Bonus Shares.
    (iii) has not bought back shares of any class.
No shares have been reserved for issue under options and Contracts/Commitments for sale of shares/ disinvestment.
equity_share.sub_comment:
The company is in existence for a period of less than five years and since incorporation, the Company :
    (i) has not allotted shares of any class for contracts without payment being received in cash.
    (ii) has not issued any Bonus Shares.
    (iii) has not bought back shares of any class.
No shares have been reserved for issue under options and Contracts/Commitments for sale of shares/ disinvestment.
